desc.EnableMinification: Apply additional minification to JavaScript and CSS assets using NUglify.
desc.EnableCompression: Pre-compress assets with Brotli and Gzip at build time for near-zero serving cost.
desc.EnableCacheHeaders: Add Cache-Control, ETag, and Vary headers to static files.
desc.EnableFontPreloadHeaders: Add Link: preload headers for font files to enable browser preloading.
desc.EnableJsModulepreloadHeaders: Add Link: modulepreload headers for JavaScript files.
desc.EnableCrossOriginResourcePolicy: Add CORP header (useful for iframe embedding, Jellyseerr integration).
desc.EnableSecurityHeaders: Add X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, and Permissions-Policy headers.
desc.EnableImageOptimization: Intercept image requests and process them with resizing, quality reduction, and format conversion.
desc.EnableImageCache: Cache processed images to disk for instant serving on subsequent requests.
desc.BrotliCompressionLevel: Higher values give better compression but slower pre-processing. 11 = maximum.
desc.HashedAssetMaxAge: Cache duration for hashed/fingerprinted assets (e.g., main.a1b2c3d4.js). Default: 31536000 (1 year, immutable).
desc.StaticAssetMaxAge: Cache duration for general static assets. Default: 2592000 (30 days).
desc.PluginAssetMaxAge: Cache duration for community plugin static assets. Default: 86400 (1 day).
desc.StaleWhileRevalidate: Serve stale content while revalidating in background. Default: 86400 (1 day).
desc.CrossOriginResourcePolicyValue: cross-origin, same-site, or same-origin. Default: cross-origin.
desc.ImageOutputFormat: Preferred output format: avif, webp, jpeg, or auto (auto negotiates AVIF → WebP → JPEG based on browser support).
desc.ImageCacheMaxAge: Cache-Control max-age for image responses. Default: 2592000 (30 days).
desc.ImageStaleWhileRevalidate: Serve stale image while revalidating in background. Default: 604800 (7 days).
desc.PluginAssetPaths: URL path prefixes for community plugin static assets (e.g., /JellyTweaks/). These paths get plugin-level caching and compression headers.
desc.perTypeImage: Configure max width (px) and quality (1–100) independently for each Jellyfin image type. Images smaller than max width are not upscaled.
desc.cacheManagement: Pre-compressed assets and optimized images are cached on disk. Clearing the cache forces re-optimization on next access. You can also trigger this from Dashboard → Scheduled Tasks → JellyShim: Clear Cache.
info.imageBuiltinText:
JellyShim processes images natively using ImageSharp + ffmpeg — no external service required.
Images are resized, re-encoded (AVIF/WebP/JPEG), and cached to disk automatically. AVIF uses Jellyfin’s bundled ffmpeg (libaom-av1) — zero additional install. Each Jellyfin image type has independent width and quality settings.
cache.taskNotFound: Cache clear task not found. Please restart Jellyfin.
desc.FileTransformationBypassPatterns: Filename patterns (wildcard * supported) for web assets patched at runtime by File Transformation plugins (HSS, Custom Tabs, JellyfinEnhanced, etc.). These files are captured AFTER transformation, then minified, compressed, and cached. Clear the JellyShim cache after updating these plugins.
avif.notSupportedDetail: ffmpeg with libaom-av1 encoder not found. Install jellyfin-ffmpeg or set JELLYFIN_FFMPEG environment variable.
